modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Jaggaer Contracts Plus Word Add-in fails to save data.

full_description_text: User is working in Microsoft Word 365. The Jaggaer Contracts Plus add-in is not saving any data entered. This issue is occurring on Windows 10.
